name: GH_ObjectResponse
summary: Lists the possible responses an object can give when confronted with a UI event.

enum_values.name: Capture
enum_values.summary: Event caused the object to become active.

enum_values.name: Release
enum_values.summary: Object was active, but event caused object to become inactive.

enum_values.name: Handled
enum_values.summary: Something happened, but no capture is needed.
